prose: Formaldehyde Fukui Reactivity — Fukui functions (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptors computed by DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard) in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz, three single-point SCF calculations (neutral, cation, anion) at the same level (no geometry relaxation). Density fitting was OFF (exact four-center integrals). Software: PySCF invoked via chemkit’s `fukui` engine; SCF converged. Most electrophilic site: C (atom 2) with f⁺ = 0.70839130; most nucleophilic site: O (atom 1) with f⁻ = 0.46742464.
